title: Fear
questions: How often do you feel afraid?
Why do people have different fears?
How do you react to fear?
Have you ever panicked with fear?
What happens to you physically and emotionally when fear takes hold of you / overcomes you?
How often do you jump or start when something frightens you?
What facial expressions accompany fear?
Do you like putting yourself in situations where you can feel fear?
Are you ever afraid of other people?
Do you think society lives in fear?
The fear of death is to be dreaded more than death itself. What do you think about this quotation?
What do you think having a fear of the 21 st century would be like?
Are you afraid of insects?
Are you afraid of strange dogs?
Do you become very nervous when you take exams?
What is a phobia? List some common phobias and describe the causes. Are phobias rational or irrational fears? Why?
What are three things you fear? Why do you fear those things? How did you come to fear those things? Can you avoid those things? How?
How do you overcome fears? Does it help to plan for the fear? Are there any medical treatments for fear? How do people overcome fears through psychological treatment?
What are three things you do NOT fear? Did you ever fear those things? How did you overcome those fears?
How does fear affect your life? Have you ever changed your plans due to fear?
What are some rational fears? Is fear a good or bad thing? Why? What things should we fear in life? Why?
